name: Book Recommendation System
description: A conversational system that recommends books and checks user engagement

welcome.purpose: Welcome the user and introduce the book recommendation service

transitions.description: Transition to genre selection after welcome

welcome.response_instructions: Warmly welcome the user and explain that you'll help them discover new books to read. Mention that you'll first need to know what genres they enjoy.

genre_selection.purpose: Ask about the user's favorite book genres

transitions.description: Transition to book recommendation once genres are known

genre_selection.extraction_instructions: Extract the user's preferred book genres from their response. Store as 'genres' (string, comma-separated, e.g. 'sci-fi, mystery, fantasy'). Only set 'genres' when they have clearly stated at least one genre preference.
genre_selection.response_instructions: Ask the user about their favorite book genres. Give examples like sci-fi, mystery, fantasy, romance, thriller, non-fiction to help them decide. Try to get at least 1-2 genres.

recommend_book.description: Recommend a book based on user preferences

transitions.description: Transition to engagement check after giving recommendation

recommend_book.extraction_instructions: Store the title of the book you are recommending as 'recommended_book' (string, just the title).
recommend_book.response_instructions: Based on the genres in the context, recommend a specific book. Include the title, author, and a brief description (2-3 sentences). Choose books that are well-regarded in their genre. Use the user's name if available in the context.

check_engagement.description: Check if the user is still engaged
check_engagement.purpose: Determine if the user wants more recommendations or is losing interest

transitions.description: User is engaged and wants more recommendations
User is disengaged or doesn't want more recommendations

check_engagement.extraction_instructions: Determine the user's engagement level from their response. Set 'engagement_level' to 'high' if they express interest, ask questions, want another recommendation, or give positive feedback. Set 'engagement_level' to 'low' if they give short/dismissive responses, say 'no', 'done', 'not interested', or want to stop.
check_engagement.response_instructions: Ask if the user would like another book recommendation.

end.response_instructions: Thank the user for using the book recommendation service. Briefly summarize the types of books recommended if multiple recommendations were made. Wish them happy reading.
